name: Bai Qi

skills.name: Reaper's Revenge
skills.description: Gains Energy when dealing or taking damage, increasing his Movement Speed and enhancing his recovery effects.

skills.name: Blood Echo
skills.description:
Deals damage to nearby enemies and recovers Health. Charging up will boost the skill's effects.
Passive: When taking damage, there is a chance to automatically trigger Skill 1.

skills.name: Deathscythe
skills.description: Summons scythes in the target direction, pulling back enemies within range while inflicting damage and slow.

skills.name: Lay Waste
skills.description:
Leaps to the target location and taunts enemies while dealing damage and enhancing his recovery effects.
Taunt duration increases with max Health.

skillsZh.name: 反擊之鐮
skillsZh.description: 白起造成或受到傷害時增加能量，獲得加速並強化回復效果。

skillsZh.name: 血之迴響
skillsZh.description:
白起對周圍造成傷害並回復生命值，蓄力可以提升技能效果。
被動：受到傷害有機率自動施放1技能。

skillsZh.name: 死神之鐮
skillsZh.description: 白起在指定方向召喚鐮刀，拉回範圍內的敵人，造成傷害和減速。

skillsZh.name: 傲慢嘲諷
skillsZh.description:
白起躍向指定位置嘲諷敵人，造成傷害並強化自身提升回復效果。
增加生命值可以提升嘲諷持續時間。

tips: Bai Qi (Tank): Tier B — 50.76% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Glacial Buckler, Longnight Guardian, Spikemail.
tipsZh: 白起（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 50.76%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：極寒風暴、永夜守護、反傷刺甲.

faqs.question: Is Bai Qi good in current season?
faqs.answer: Bai Qi is Tier B Tank with 50.76% win rate, 0.35% pick rate, and 0.04% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Bai Qi build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Glacial Buckler, Longnight Guardian, Spikemail, Succubus Cloak, Dragon's Rage, Sage's Sanctuary.

faqs.question: How to counter Bai Qi?
faqs.answer: Pick Zhuangzi, Ying Zheng. Strong into Arke, Garo.

faqsZh.question: 白起 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 白起 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.76%、選取 0.35%、禁用 0.04%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 白起 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：極寒風暴、永夜守護、反傷刺甲、魔女斗篷、怒龍劍盾、賢者的庇護.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 白起？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Zhuangzi、Ying Zheng。白起 克制 Arke、Garo。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Arke, Garo. Weak into: Zhuangzi, Ying Zheng.

guide.overview: Bai Qi is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.9% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Bai Qi: Enhance Speed Up Gains Energy when dealing or taking damage, increasing his Movement Speed and enhancing his recovery effects.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Deftness, Blazing Cape, Cuirass of Savagery, then complete Eye of the Phoenix, Overlord's Platemail, Spikemail. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Bai Qi's Tank kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Blood Echo → Deathscythe → Lay Waste → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Lay Waste (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Blood Echo, and Lay Waste on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Blood Echo → Deathscythe → Lay Waste → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Bai Qi sits at Tier B globally (51.9% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Bai Qi vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Bai Qi has +0.5% WR vs Kaizer in Camp data. Choose Bai Qi when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Bai Qi vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 0.4% more often globally. Choose Bai Qi when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Bai Qi excels into Arke, Garo. Avoid blind picking into Zhuangzi, Ying Zheng without team peel.
